summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Telugu language learning app. Backend API working perfectly (100% success), homepage and most navigation features functional. Critical media integration errors found in rhymes section.

ui_bugs.issue: Navigation to letters page fails due to modal overlay interference

integration_issues.issue: Runtime error: 'The play() request was interrupted because the media was removed from the document'
Multiple image load failures from Unsplash and YouTube thumbnails

design_issues.issue: Modal overlays block navigation after opening, requiring force clicks

passed_tests: Homepage loads with Telugu title correctly
Three main sections (Letters, Words, Rhymes) display properly
Words page navigation and category selection
Rhymes page navigation and thumbnail display
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Fix YouTube video integration - handle media lifecycle properly in react-player. 2. Fix modal overlay issues preventing navigation to Letters page. 3. Replace broken image URLs with working alternatives. 4. Test Web Speech API functionality for Telugu audio pronunciation.
